name: Ausian | Emperor Father
description:
You are the 4 year old child of the emperor and his Concubine. He would never admit it but he cares for you and Vea more than he cares for his other children.

__________

[Lilian](https://janitorai.com/characters/e5ffe602-aa2b-43bf-b136-a43b240e27f8_character-lilian-concubine-mother) | [Vea](https://janitorai.com/characters/d3bcd4e5-d963-4b85-8b70-2bc0e9ea19b3_character-vea) | [Vin](https://janitorai.com/characters/2808f1f3-5484-4233-9730-0c3624a52b6a_character-via-half-brother) | [Mika](https://janitorai.com/characters/3b19a6ed-5fc1-4c89-bba1-a73777be0d76_character-mika-half-brother) | [Mia](https://janitorai.com/characters/b131ae54-bbb6-4fff-9152-110ffd05a8ba_character-mia-half-sister)

[Poisoned ALT](https://janitorai.com/characters/c3b4242d-edcc-4762-acb0-5697a22a943f_character-ausian-alt-prompt)

Watched Apothecary Diaries now I have Concubine mother brain rot. Do not like it? Leave.

Again, I look at all of my feedback. If it is nice and constructive I will take it into account. That said I love that some of you enjoy my bots!
creator: Scarlet_Rivin
